task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sample Order Lines' dataset should be visible in the data panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Marimekko (Mosaic) visualization type is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization grammar/properties panel should show the Marimekko or Mosaic chart icon selected as the active visualization type.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Region' is mapped to the category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Region' data pill should be placed in the 'Category' (or X-Axis) drop zone in the visualization grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Product Category' is mapped to color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Category' data pill should be placed in the 'Color' drop zone in the visualization grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Sales' is mapped to column width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales' data pill should be placed in the 'Size' or 'Width' drop zone in the visualization grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Profit' is mapped to segment height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Profit' data pill should be placed in the 'Height' or 'Y-Axis' drop zone in the visualization grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Market_Structure'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the filename 'Market_Structure' (or 'Market_Structure.dva') or the top title bar of the application displaying 'Market_Structure' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping data pills and interacting with the application's menus, rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Marimekko chart should be rendered in the main canvas area of Oracle Analytics Desktop, matching the data mappings, and not appear as an imported static image.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved through the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Oracle Analytics Desktop save dialog or interface should be visible, saving to a local directory (like Documents), rather than a text editor or terminal bypass.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected visualization type is Marimekko (also known as Mosaic). The required columns to be mapped are 'Region', 'Product Category', 'Sales', and 'Profit'. The workbook must be saved with the filename 'Market_Structure.dva', expected to be located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Market_Structure.dva'.
